hero.heading: CAD-designed cabinets, built to fit the stone.
hero.lede: We design your cabinets in 3D and coordinate them with your counters and tile — one shop, one crew, one install date.
hero.alt: Warm maple kitchen cabinets with glass uppers, granite counters, and a black island

linesLede: We carry top-rated cabinetry from five makers — every line on display in the Ardmore showroom. Browse a catalog, then come see the doors in person.
stepsHeading: From measurement to installed in three steps.

cta.text: One crew handles cabinets, counters, and tile.

doorStyles.name: Shaker
doorStyles.desc: Clean recessed panel — our most-requested door

doorStyles.name: Flat-Panel
doorStyles.desc: Slab door, handleless option for modern kitchens

steps.title: Measure & CAD
steps.desc: We template your space and render the layout in 3D before anything is ordered.

steps.title: Choose door & finish
steps.desc: Pick a door style, wood species, and finish from samples in the showroom.

steps.title: Build & install
steps.desc: Cabinets arrive boxed and are installed alongside your countertops and tile.
